description: Gyroid minimal surface as an abstract sculpture, optionally bounded by a sphere or box for a finite object.
example_prompts: create gyroid sculpture bounded by a sphere with rounded edges
build abstract porous minimal surface object for 3D printing aesthetic
compose gyroid lattice intersected with a sphere for a finite coral sculpture

screenshot_metadata.notes: Use step multiplier 0.7 for gyroid. Bound radius 2.0. Thickness 0.3.
